displayTitle.zh: 深度学习进入复杂决策系统
displayTitle.en: Deep Learning Enters Complex Decision Systems

displaySummary.zh: AlphaGo 展示了深度神经网络不仅能处理感知任务，也能通过搜索和强化学习参与复杂决策。
displaySummary.en: AlphaGo showed that deep neural networks could go beyond perception and contribute to complex decision-making through search and reinforcement learning.
